key_takeaways: cGMP (CDMO) is the growth engine: two molecules commercial and the Dahej cGMP-4 block commissioned, with order visibility described as the strongest in company history.
Management guided to ~20% FY27 revenue growth and a ~25% EBITDA margin as high-value CDMO mix rises — the numbers the next quarter must deliver against.
Model builds FY27E revenue to ~₹3,977cr and EBITDA to ~₹994cr on those levers; FY28E carries an 18% growth / 26% margin assumption.
At ₹7,689 the stock trades ~49.7x FY27E and ~40.1x FY28E P/E — rich versus its ~45x 5-yr median and a ~38x peer median, so the guide is largely priced in.
Key risks are off-call: a ~₹120cr GST demand under appeal and ICRA's flag on the debt-funded capex peak; execution on the cGMP-4 ramp is the swing factor.
Verdict: Hold-watch — a high-quality franchise at a full multiple; add on a ramp-driven earnings surprise or a de-rating toward the peer median.
